classes.name: Barbarian
classes.description: A fierce warrior of primitive background who can enter a battle rage. Barbarians are fierce warriors from the wilds. They live for the thrill of battle and revel in the joy of conquest.

subclasses.name: Path of the Berserker
subclasses.description: High damage but exhaustion drawback. Frenzy allows extra attacks but causes exhaustion levels, making sustained use costly.

features_detail.name: Frenzy
features_detail.desc: When Raging, go into a frenzy. Bonus action melee weapon attack each turn. When Rage ends: 1 level of exhaustion.

features_detail.name: Mindless Rage
features_detail.desc: Can't be charmed or frightened while Raging. If charmed/frightened when Rage starts: effect is suspended.

features_detail.name: Intimidating Presence
features_detail.desc: Action: frighten one creature within 30 ft (WIS save DC 8+PB+CHA). Repeat save each turn. Once per long rest per creature.

features_detail.name: Retaliation
features_detail.desc: When you take damage from a creature within 5 ft, reaction to make a melee weapon attack against that creature.

subclasses.name: Path of the Totem Warrior
subclasses.description: Extremely durable. Bear Totem grants resistance to almost all damage types while raging — best tanking option in the game.

features_detail.name: Spirit Seeker
features_detail.desc: Cast Beast Sense and Speak with Animals as rituals.

features_detail.name: Totem Spirit
features_detail.desc: Choose Bear (resistance to all damage except psychic while Raging), Eagle (Dash as bonus action, no OA except from eagles), or Wolf (allies have advantage on melee attacks vs. prone enemies near you).

features_detail.name: Aspect of the Beast
features_detail.desc: Bear: carry double, advantage on STR checks. Eagle: see 1 mile clearly, dim light no disadvantage. Wolf: can't be tracked except by magic; track others perfectly.

features_detail.name: Spirit Walker
features_detail.desc: Cast Commune with Nature as a ritual.

features_detail.name: Totemic Attunement
features_detail.desc: Bear: frightened enemies attack you. Eagle: fly speed = walking. Wolf: knock prone on hit (if Large or smaller).

subclasses.name: Path of the Ancestral Guardian
subclasses.description: Protects allies via ancestral spirits. Marks enemies and imposes disadvantage on attacks against anyone but you.

subclasses.name: Storm Herald
subclasses.description: Aura damage that scales with level but remains inconsistent. Tundra, Desert, and Sea auras offer different elemental riders.

features_detail.name: Storm Aura
features_detail.desc: Choose Desert (2 fire dmg in 10 ft aura), Sea (lightning on one creature), or Tundra (temp HP to all allies in aura) — activates each turn of Rage.

features_detail.name: Storm Soul
features_detail.desc: Desert: fire resistance, touch ignites flammable objects. Sea: lightning resistance, breathe water, swim speed 30 ft. Tundra: cold resistance, water freezes.

features_detail.name: Shielding Storm
features_detail.desc: Allies within 10 ft gain resistance of your Storm Soul type.

features_detail.name: Raging Storm
features_detail.desc: Desert: reaction to 2d6 fire on attacker (DEX save). Sea: prone on OA (STR save). Tundra: freeze ground, restrain (STR save).

subclasses.name: Zealot
subclasses.description: High damage bonus and extremely hard to kill — Rage Beyond Death lets you stay at 0 HP without death saves while raging.

features_detail.name: Divine Fury
features_detail.desc: Weapon attacks deal 1d6+half level radiant/necrotic bonus damage while Raging (first hit each turn).

features_detail.name: Warrior of the Gods
features_detail.desc: If you die, spells that restore life need no material components to revive you.

features_detail.name: Fanatical Focus
features_detail.desc: Once per Rage: reroll a failed saving throw.

features_detail.name: Zealous Presence
features_detail.desc: Once per long rest, bonus action: 10 creatures within 60 ft gain advantage on attack rolls and saving throws until start of your next turn.

features_detail.name: Rage Beyond Death
features_detail.desc: While Raging, reaching 0 HP doesn't make you unconscious. Rage still ends normally. Die when Rage ends if still at 0 HP.

subclasses.name: Beast
subclasses.description: Strong natural weapon scaling. Bestial Soul options provide claws, bite, and tail — good damage and bonus mobility.

subclasses.name: Battlerager
subclasses.description: Weak scaling melee tank. Very limited — spiky armor adds minor damage but falls off quickly at higher levels.

features_detail.name: Battlerager Armor
features_detail.desc: Can use spiked armor as weapon. Bonus action: 1d4+STR piercing damage. Grappling: 3 piercing damage.

features_detail.name: Reckless Abandon
features_detail.desc: When using Reckless Attack, gain temp HP equal to CON mod (min 1).

features_detail.name: Battlerager Charge
features_detail.desc: Dash as bonus action while Raging.

features_detail.name: Spiked Retribution
features_detail.desc: When creature within 5 ft hits you: 3 piercing damage (if wearing spiked armor and not incapacitated).

subclasses.name: Wild Magic
subclasses.description: Random magical surges on rage — mixed value. Unpredictable but some effects are very powerful if they proc at the right time.

features_detail.name: Wild Magic Surge
features_detail.desc: After casting a sorcerer spell 1st level or higher: DM can have you roll on the Wild Magic Surge table.

features_detail.name: Tides of Chaos
features_detail.desc: Gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw. 1/long rest (or when Wild Magic Surge occurs).

features_detail.name: Bend Luck
features_detail.desc: Spend 2 sorcery points: add/subtract 1d4 from another creature's attack roll, ability check, or saving throw.

features_detail.name: Controlled Chaos
features_detail.desc: When rolling Wild Magic Surge: roll twice and use either result.

features_detail.name: Spell Bombardment
features_detail.desc: When rolling spell damage: if any dice show max, roll one of those dice again and add to total (once per turn).

classes.name: Bard
classes.description: An inspiring magician whose power echoes the music of creation. Bards use their artistry to inspire, enchant, and unravel mysteries.

subclasses.name: College of Lore
subclasses.description: Best versatility. Cutting Words debuffs enemies on any roll, and Magical Secrets at level 6 gives access to any spells in the game.

features_detail.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features_detail.desc: Proficiency in 3 skills of your choice.

features_detail.name: Cutting Words
features_detail.desc: Reaction when a creature you can see within 60 ft makes attack/ability/damage roll: subtract Bardic Inspiration die from roll.

features_detail.name: Additional Magical Secrets
features_detail.desc: Learn 2 spells from any class list. Count as Bard spells.

features_detail.name: Peerless Skill
features_detail.desc: When making an ability check, expend Bardic Inspiration die and add it to the check.

subclasses.name: College of Valor
subclasses.description: Balanced but outclassed by Swords and Lore. Grants Extra Attack and Combat Inspiration, but less flexible overall.

features_detail.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features_detail.desc: Proficiency in medium armor, shields, and martial weapons.

features_detail.name: Combat Inspiration
features_detail.desc: Creatures using Bardic Inspiration for attack rolls or AC (reaction when hit) add die to the roll.

features_detail.name: Extra Attack
features_detail.desc: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

features_detail.name: Battle Magic
features_detail.desc: When casting a Bard spell using an action, make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

subclasses.name: College of Swords
subclasses.description: Mobile melee bard with Blade Flourish maneuvers — strong burst and mobility. Defensive Flourish can push AC temporarily.

features_detail.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features_detail.desc: Proficiency with medium armor and scimitars. Can use weapon as spellcasting focus.

features_detail.name: Fighting Style
features_detail.desc: Choose Two-Weapon Fighting or Dueling.

features_detail.name: Blade Flourish
features_detail.desc: When attacking, gain +10 ft movement. Use Bardic Inspiration with attacks: Defensive (AC), Slashing (damage + push), Mobile (no OA + move).

features_detail.name: Extra Attack
features_detail.desc: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

features_detail.name: Master's Flourish
features_detail.desc: When using Blade Flourish, use d6 instead of Bardic Inspiration die (free).

subclasses.name: Glamour
subclasses.description: Strong party repositioning via Mantle of Inspiration. Enthralling Performance grants crowd control in social situations.

features_detail.name: Mantle of Inspiration
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: spend Bardic Inspiration to give up to 5 allies temp HP (5+Charisma mod) and free movement without OA.

features_detail.name: Enthralling Performance
features_detail.desc: Fascinate humanoids in 60 ft for 1 min (WIS save). 1/short rest.

features_detail.name: Mantle of Majesty
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: cast Command without expending a spell slot each turn for 1 min. 1/long rest.

features_detail.name: Unbreakable Majesty
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: majestic presence for 1 min. Creatures attacking must make CHA save or attack other target (or waste action). 1/long rest.

subclasses.name: Whispers
subclasses.description: Burst psychic damage via Psychic Blades plus fear mechanics. Strong against single targets but heavily resource dependent.

subclasses.name: Creation
subclasses.description: Object creation utility via Performance of Creation. Mote of Potential augments Bardic Inspiration with powerful effects.

subclasses.name: Eloquence
subclasses.description: Best social + control bard. Unsettling Words lowers saving throws, and Unfailing Inspiration ensures dice are never wasted.

subclasses.name: College of Spirits
subclasses.description: Ghost-story themed bard using Tales from Beyond to randomly generate powerful effects — healing, damage, or control based on die roll.

subclasses.name: Dance
subclasses.description: Highly mobile bard buffing allies through movement and melee synergy. Strong party enabler but not top raw power.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.description: A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power. Clerics are intermediaries between the mortal world and the distant planes of the gods.

subclasses.name: Life Domain
subclasses.description: Best raw healing output. Disciple of Life adds bonus HP to every healing spell, and Heavy Armor proficiency adds durability.

features_detail.name: Bonus Proficiency
features_detail.desc: Proficiency with heavy armor.

features_detail.name: Disciple of Life
features_detail.desc: Healing spells restore additional HP equal to 2 + spell level.

features_detail.name: Preserve Life
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: restore HP among creatures within 30 ft, up to 5× your cleric level total (no creature above half max HP).

features_detail.name: Blessed Healer
features_detail.desc: When casting healing spells on others, you regain 2+spell level HP.

features_detail.name: Divine Strike
features_detail.desc: Once per turn, weapon attack deals +1d8 radiant damage (2d8 at Level 14).

features_detail.name: Supreme Healing
features_detail.desc: Roll maximum on healing spell dice instead of rolling.

subclasses.name: Light Domain
subclasses.description: Strong AoE damage. Warding Flare imposes disadvantage on attacks, and Radiance of the Dawn deals AoE radiant damage.

features_detail.name: Bonus Cantrip
features_detail.desc: Gain the Light cantrip if you don't already have it.

features_detail.name: Warding Flare
features_detail.desc: Reaction when attacked: impose disadvantage on the attack roll. PB uses/long rest.

features_detail.name: Radiance of the Dawn
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: magical darkness in 30 ft dispelled, hostile creatures take 2d10+Cleric level radiant (CON save for half).

features_detail.name: Improved Flare
features_detail.desc: Use Warding Flare to protect allies within 30 ft.

features_detail.name: Potent Spellcasting
features_detail.desc: Add WIS mod to Cleric cantrip damage.

features_detail.name: Corona of Light
features_detail.desc: Activate aura of sunlight (60 ft bright, 30 ft dim). Enemies: disadvantage on saves vs fire/radiant. 1 min, 1/long rest.

subclasses.name: Trickery Domain
subclasses.description: Illusions and stealth access. Invoke Duplicity creates a duplicate, but weaker compared to other cleric subclasses overall.

features_detail.name: Blessing of the Trickster
features_detail.desc: Touch a creature to give advantage on Stealth checks for 1 hour.

features_detail.name: Invoke Duplicity
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: create illusory duplicate for 1 min. Move it 30 ft, spells count as cast from duplicate, advantage on attacks vs creatures within 5 ft of it.

features_detail.name: Cloak of Shadows
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: become invisible until end of next turn.

features_detail.name: Divine Strike
features_detail.desc: Once per turn +1d8 poison damage on weapon attacks (2d8 at Level 14).

features_detail.name: Improved Duplicity
features_detail.desc: Create 4 duplicates with Invoke Duplicity instead of 1.

subclasses.name: War Domain
subclasses.description: Strong early game with War Priest bonus attack action. Falls off later as martial options don't scale as well.

features_detail.name: War Priest
features_detail.desc: When using Attack action, make one weapon attack as a bonus action. PB uses/long rest.

features_detail.name: Guided Strike
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: add +10 to an attack roll (after seeing the roll, before outcome).

features_detail.name: War God's Blessing
features_detail.desc: Reaction: grant +10 to an ally's attack roll within 30 ft. Channel Divinity use.

features_detail.name: Divine Strike
features_detail.desc: Once per turn +1d8 weapon damage type on weapon attacks (2d8 at Level 14).

features_detail.name: Avatar of Battle
features_detail.desc: Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons.

subclasses.name: Twilight
subclasses.description: One of the strongest subclasses in the game. Twilight Sanctuary grants temp HP or ends charm/fear every turn in a 30 ft radius.

subclasses.name: Order
subclasses.description: Action economy manipulation. Voice of Authority lets an ally attack whenever you cast a spell on them — excellent synergy.

subclasses.name: Grave
subclasses.description: Prevents death and stabilizes the party. Path to the Grave doubles the next damage instance on a creature — deadly with smites.

subclasses.name: Peace
subclasses.description: Broken-level party buffs. Emboldening Bond adds 1d4 to attacks and saves for multiple allies — permanently active.

subclasses.name: Arcana
subclasses.description: Wizard-like spell access. Arcane Mastery at level 17 grants access to extremely powerful wizard spells.

subclasses.name: Knowledge
subclasses.description: Skill-heavy but weak combat. Visions of the Past and Potent Spellcasting offer utility but limited combat contribution.

features_detail.name: Blessings of Knowledge
features_detail.desc: Proficiency in 2 languages and 2 skills from: Arcana, History, Nature, Religion. Double proficiency in chosen skills.

features_detail.name: Knowledge of the Ages
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: proficiency in any skill or tool for 10 minutes.

features_detail.name: Read Thoughts
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: read a creature's surface thoughts for 1 min. Cast Suggestion on it without expending a slot.

features_detail.name: Potent Spellcasting
features_detail.desc: Add WIS mod to Cleric cantrip damage.

features_detail.name: Visions of the Past
features_detail.desc: Cast Object Reading or Area Reading (ritual) to see past events related to an object or area.

subclasses.name: Tempest
subclasses.description: Burst lightning damage. Destructive Wrath maximizes thunder/lightning damage — paired with Call Lightning for massive burst.

features_detail.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features_detail.desc: Heavy armor and martial weapon proficiency.

features_detail.name: Wrath of the Storm
features_detail.desc: Reaction when hit: 2d8 lightning or thunder damage (DEX save for half). PB uses/long rest.

features_detail.name: Destructive Wrath
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: maximize lightning or thunder damage from a spell.

features_detail.name: Thunderbolt Strike
features_detail.desc: When dealing lightning damage to Large or smaller creature: push it 10 ft.

features_detail.name: Divine Strike
features_detail.desc: Once per turn +1d8 thunder damage on weapon attacks (2d8 at Level 14).

features_detail.name: Stormborn
features_detail.desc: Outdoor fly speed = walking speed.

subclasses.name: Forge
subclasses.description: Extremely durable buffer. Soul of the Forge grants +1 AC in heavy armor and resistance to fire — strong early and late game.

subclasses.name: Death
subclasses.description: Necrotic niche damage. Reaper lets cantrips hit two targets and Indestructible forms of Undead are strong for DM characters.

subclasses.name: Nature
subclasses.description: Weak druid-like cleric. Limited domain spells and features don't offer strong enough return compared to other cleric options.

features_detail.name: Acolyte of Nature
features_detail.desc: Learn one Druid cantrip. Proficiency in Animal Handling, Nature, or Survival.

features_detail.name: Bonus Proficiency
features_detail.desc: Heavy armor proficiency.

features_detail.name: Charm Animals and Plants
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: charm beasts and plants within 30 ft (WIS save) for 1 min.

features_detail.name: Dampen Elements
features_detail.desc: Reaction when ally within 30 ft takes acid/cold/fire/lightning/thunder damage: grant resistance to the trigger.

features_detail.name: Divine Strike
features_detail.desc: Once per turn +1d8 cold/fire/lightning damage on weapon attacks (2d8 at Level 14).

features_detail.name: Master of Nature
features_detail.desc: Bonus action to command charmed creatures from Charm Animals and Plants.

classes.name: Druid
classes.description: A priest of the Old Faith, wielding the powers of nature – moonlight and plant growth, fire and lightning – and adopting animal forms.

subclasses.name: Circle of the Moon
subclasses.description: Wild Shape combat dominance. Combat Wild Shape allows bonus action shifting, and Elemental Forms at level 10 are nearly unstoppable.

features_detail.name: Combat Wild Shape
features_detail.desc: Wild Shape as bonus action. Expend spell slots to regain HP (1d8 per spell level) while transformed.

features_detail.name: Circle Forms
features_detail.desc: Wild Shape into CR 1 creatures (CR 2 at Level 4, CR 3+ at Level 8 etc.). Can use combat forms.

features_detail.name: Primal Strike
features_detail.desc: Wild Shape attacks count as magical for overcoming resistance.

features_detail.name: Elemental Wild Shape
features_detail.desc: Expend two uses of Wild Shape to transform into Air/Earth/Fire/Water Elemental.

features_detail.name: Thousand Forms
features_detail.desc: Cast Alter Self at will.

subclasses.name: Circle of the Land
subclasses.description: Reliable control caster with Natural Recovery for spell slot restoration. Solid but lacks burst compared to Moon or Stars.

features_detail.name: Natural Recovery
features_detail.desc: During short rest: recover spell slots totaling up to half druid level (rounded up). 1/long rest.

features_detail.name: Land's Stride
features_detail.desc: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement. Advantage on saves vs. magically created plants.

features_detail.name: Nature's Ward
features_detail.desc: Immune to poison/disease. Can't be charmed or frightened by elementals or fey.

features_detail.name: Nature's Sanctuary
features_detail.desc: Beasts and plants make WIS save (DC = spell save DC) or can't attack you.

subclasses.name: Stars
subclasses.description: Very flexible and strong. Starry Form grants Archer (bonus ranged attacks), Chalice (bonus healing), or Dragon (concentration boost).

subclasses.name: Shepherd
subclasses.description: Summon scaling is extremely strong. Faithful Summons and Speech of the Woods with Aura of the Guardian make summons unkillable.

subclasses.name: Spores
subclasses.description: Melee hybrid with Halo of Spores damage and Symbiotic Entity granting temp HP equal to 4× Wild Shape uses.

features_detail.name: Halo of Spores
features_detail.desc: Reaction when creature enters 10 ft: 1d4 necrotic (CON save). Increases as you level.

features_detail.name: Symbiotic Entity
features_detail.desc: Channel Wildshape (no transform): 4× druid level temp HP, Halo doubles, melee deals +1d6 necrotic for 10 min.

features_detail.name: Fungal Infestation
features_detail.desc: Reaction when beast/humanoid (size Large or smaller) dies within 10 ft: animate as zombie for 1 hour. PB uses/long rest.

features_detail.name: Spreading Spores
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: move Halo of Spores to 30 ft cube. Lasts 1 min or until Symbiotic Entity ends.

features_detail.name: Fungal Body
features_detail.desc: Immune to blinded, deafened, frightened, poisoned. Critical hits become normal hits.

subclasses.name: Wildfire
subclasses.description: Mobility + damage + healing. Enhanced Bond boosts spell damage and healing, and Wildfire Spirit offers consistent teleportation.

subclasses.name: Dreams
subclasses.description: Healing and mobility via Hearth of Moonlight and Balm of the Summer Court. Mechanically weak compared to other druid options.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor. Fighters share an unparalleled mastery with weapons and armor.

subclasses.name: Champion
subclasses.description: Simple but low ceiling. Improved Critical and Remarkable Athlete are passive features — easy to play but rarely optimal.

features_detail.name: Improved Critical
features_detail.desc: Weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19–20.

features_detail.name: Remarkable Athlete
features_detail.desc: Add half your PB (rounded up) to STR/DEX/CON checks not using proficiency. Running jump distance +STR mod.

features_detail.name: Additional Fighting Style
features_detail.desc: Choose a second option from the Fighting Style feature.

features_detail.name: Superior Critical
features_detail.desc: Weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 18–20.

features_detail.name: Survivor
features_detail.desc: At the start of your turn if you have fewer than half your max HP but more than 0: regain 5+CON mod HP.

subclasses.name: Battle Master
subclasses.description: Best martial control toolkit. Superiority Dice power diverse maneuvers — Trip, Disarm, Rally, Precision — for unmatched tactical flexibility.

features_detail.name: Combat Superiority
features_detail.desc: Learn 3 maneuvers, gain 4 superiority dice (d8). Save DC = 8+PB+STR/DEX. Recover on short/long rest.

features_detail.name: Student of War
features_detail.desc: Proficiency with artisan's tools of your choice.

features_detail.name: Know Your Enemy
features_detail.desc: Spend 1 min studying a creature. Learn 2 of: STR/DEX/CON comparison, AC, levels, HP range.

features_detail.name: Improved Combat Superiority
features_detail.desc: Superiority dice become d10 (d12 at Level 18).

features_detail.name: Relentless
features_detail.desc: When rolling initiative with no superiority dice: regain 1 superiority die.

subclasses.name: Eldritch Knight
subclasses.description: Defensive magic access. War Magic grants bonus attack after a cantrip, and spell access adds Shield and Absorb Elements for durability.

features_detail.name: Spellcasting
features_detail.desc: Cast Wizard spells (INT). Cantrips + 1st-level slots. Limited spell selection: mostly Abjuration and Evocation.

features_detail.name: Weapon Bond
features_detail.desc: Ritual bond with up to 2 weapons. Can't be disarmed. Teleport bonded weapon to hand as bonus action.

features_detail.name: War Magic
features_detail.desc: When using Attack action to cast a cantrip: bonus action weapon attack.

features_detail.name: Eldritch Strike
features_detail.desc: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack: disadvantage on its next save vs your spell before end of next turn.

features_detail.name: Arcane Charge
features_detail.desc: When using Action Surge: teleport up to 30 ft (before or after extra action).

features_detail.name: Improved War Magic
features_detail.desc: When using Attack action to cast any spell (not just cantrip): bonus action weapon attack.

subclasses.name: Rune Knight
subclasses.description: Huge utility and scaling. Runes grant diverse benefits — Giant's Might enlarges you for extra damage and grapple advantage.

subclasses.name: Echo Knight
subclasses.description: Extremely strong battlefield manipulation using an echo clone to extend reach, create extra attacks, and provide teleportation-like positioning.

subclasses.name: Cavalier
subclasses.description: Strong protector via Unwavering Mark — attacks against marked targets provoke a bonus attack from you. Great on mounted builds.

subclasses.name: Samurai
subclasses.description: Burst advantage engine. Fighting Spirit grants advantage and temp HP three times per day, and Rapid Strike enables extra attack for damage.

subclasses.name: Psi Warrior
subclasses.description: Psionic versatility. Telekinetic Adept and Psionic Strike add psychic damage and forced movement — interesting but resource-limited.

subclasses.name: Purple Dragon Knight (Banneret)
subclasses.description: Fighter subclass focused on battlefield leadership and ally support, but mechanically underpowered compared to other Fighter archetypes.

subclasses.name: Arcane Archer
subclasses.description: Limited uses and weak scaling. Arcane Shot options are creative but running out of uses mid-combat is a frequent problem.

classes.name: Monk
classes.description: A master of martial arts, harnessing the power of the body in pursuit of physical and spiritual perfection.

subclasses.name: Way of the Open Hand
subclasses.description: Good early game. Open Hand Technique adds prone, push, or no-reaction effects on Flurry of Blows — falls off in later tiers.

features_detail.name: Open Hand Technique
features_detail.desc: When hitting with Flurry of Blows: prone (DEX save), push 15 ft (STR save), or can't take reactions until end of your next turn.

features_detail.name: Wholeness of Body
features_detail.desc: Action: regain HP equal to 3× your monk level. 1/long rest.

features_detail.name: Tranquility
features_detail.desc: At end of long rest: gain effect of Sanctuary spell until next long rest or attacking. DC = 8+WIS+PB.

features_detail.name: Quivering Palm
features_detail.desc: Set up lethal vibrations in a creature on unarmed hit. Within 27 days: use action, target CON save or drop to 0 HP (or 10d10 on success).

subclasses.name: Way of Shadow
subclasses.description: Stealth and teleport niche. Shadow Arts grants minor illusion cantrip and Darkness, and Shadow Step teleports between darkness areas.

features_detail.name: Shadow Arts
features_detail.desc: Spend ki: cast Darkness, Darkvision, Pass without Trace, Silence (no concentration). Minor Illusion cantrip for free.

features_detail.name: Shadow Step
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: teleport 60 ft between dim/dark areas. Advantage on next attack.

features_detail.name: Cloak of Shadows
features_detail.desc: In dim light or darkness, use action to become invisible. Ends on attack or cast.

features_detail.name: Opportunist
features_detail.desc: When another creature within 5 ft is hit: reaction to make unarmed strike against that creature.

subclasses.name: Way of the Four Elements
subclasses.description: Too ki-expensive. Elemental disciplines cost more ki than equivalent spells, making it less efficient than other monk subclasses.

features_detail.name: Elemental Disciplines
features_detail.desc: Learn 2 disciplines (gain more at levels 6, 11, 17). Spend ki to activate: fire punches, water whip, earth tremor, stone endurance, wind step, etc.

features_detail.name: Additional Disciplines
features_detail.desc: Learn 2 more Elemental Disciplines.

features_detail.name: Advanced Disciplines
features_detail.desc: Learn 2 more Elemental Disciplines (access to higher-level ones).

features_detail.name: Master Disciplines
features_detail.desc: Learn 2 more and access to most powerful disciplines.

subclasses.name: Mercy
subclasses.description: Hybrid DPS and Healer. Hands of Harm adds necrotic damage, Hands of Healing cures conditions, and Visage of the Hand grants fear and blind.

subclasses.name: Way of the Long Death
subclasses.description: Survivability focused. Touch of Death grants temp HP on kills, Mastery of Death prevents death once per ki, Hour of Reaping frightens all nearby enemies.

subclasses.name: Kensei
subclasses.description: Weapon monk scaling. Agile Parry adds +2 AC with unarmed strike, and Sharpen the Blade stacks magic bonuses on chosen weapons.

subclasses.name: Astral Self
subclasses.description: Strong scaling astral arms extend reach and grant extra attack. Visage of the Astral Self grants darkvision and intimidation advantage.

subclasses.name: Way of the Ascendant Dragon
subclasses.description: Dragon-themed monk that replaces unarmed strike damage with elemental breath effects, provides flight and mobility scaling, and enhances battlefield control.

subclasses.name: Sun Soul
subclasses.description: Ranged monk option. Radiant Sun Bolt adds a ranged attack option but ki costs for Searing Arc Strike make it less efficient.

subclasses.name: Drunken Master
subclasses.description: Mobility trickery. Drunken Technique adds disengage and bonus movement on Flurry of Blows — fun but not top-tier damage.

classes.name: Paladin
classes.description: A holy warrior bound to a sacred oath. Paladins are united by their oaths to stand against the forces of evil.

subclasses.name: Oath of Devotion
subclasses.description: Classic but basic. Sacred Weapon adds CHA to attacks and Sacred Flame is solid but other oaths simply offer more raw power.

features_detail.name: Sacred Weapon
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: imbue weapon with holy power for 1 min. +CHA mod to attacks, sheds bright light 20 ft.

features_detail.name: Turn the Unholy
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: undead and fiends within 30 ft must make WIS save or flee for 1 min.

features_detail.name: Aura of Devotion
features_detail.desc: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft (30 ft at Level 18) can't be charmed while you're conscious.

features_detail.name: Purity of Spirit
features_detail.desc: Always under the effect of Protection from Evil and Good.

features_detail.name: Holy Nimbus
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: aura of sunlight for 1 min. Enemies starting turn in it take 10 radiant. Advantage on saves vs. fiends and undead. 1/long rest.

subclasses.name: Oath of the Ancients
subclasses.description: Magic resistance aura at level 7 is exceptional, but other features are less impactful compared to stronger oath options.

features_detail.name: Nature's Wrath
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: spectral vines restrain a creature within 10 ft (STR or DEX save, repeat each turn).

features_detail.name: Turn the Faithless
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: fey and fiends within 30 ft WIS save or flee for 1 min.

features_detail.name: Aura of Warding
features_detail.desc: You and allies within 10 ft (30 ft at 18) have resistance to spell damage.

features_detail.name: Undying Sentinel
features_detail.desc: When reduced to 0 HP: drop to 1 HP instead. 1/long rest. No aging.

features_detail.name: Elder Champion
features_detail.desc: Transform: regain 10 HP per turn, cast paladin spells as bonus action, enemies within 10 ft have disadvantage on saves vs. spells. 1/long rest.

subclasses.name: Oath of Vengeance
subclasses.description: Top single-target burst. Vow of Enmity grants advantage and Misty Step on spell list allows incredible repositioning for smite builds.

features_detail.name: Abjure Enemy
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: fiend/undead frightened and speed 0 (WIS save). Others: speed halved on fail. 1 min.

features_detail.name: Vow of Enmity
features_detail.desc: Channel Divinity: advantage on attacks against one creature for 1 min.

features_detail.name: Relentless Avenger
features_detail.desc: When you hit with OA: move up to half your speed immediately after attack (no OA from that movement).

features_detail.name: Soul of Vengeance
features_detail.desc: When Vow of Enmity target attacks: reaction to make a weapon attack against it.

features_detail.name: Avenging Angel
features_detail.desc: Transform with wings (fly 60 ft), Aura of Menace: 30 ft aura, enemies WIS save or frightened for 1 min and -4 AC. 1/long rest.

subclasses.name: Redemption
subclasses.description: Damage mitigation via Aura of the Guardian absorbs damage for allies. Pacifism restrictions are limiting but the defensive power is real.

subclasses.name: Oathbreaker
subclasses.description: Extremely strong dark-themed paladin with necrotic damage, fear control, undead synergy, and high burst smite potential. Requires DM approval.

subclasses.name: Oath of the Noble Genies
subclasses.description: Extremely strong elemental paladin with high mobility, flexible resistances, and strong smite augmentation. Level 20 capstone grants pseudo-wish for saving rolls.

subclasses.name: Crown
subclasses.description: Strong defender via Champion Challenge — forces enemies to attack you instead of allies. Divine Allegiance absorbs ally damage.

subclasses.name: Conquest
subclasses.description: Fear lockdown. Aura of Conquest deals psychic damage and reduces speed to 0 for frightened creatures — devastating with fear spells.

subclasses.name: Watchers
subclasses.description: Anti-magic support. Aura of the Sentinel adds proficiency bonus to initiative and Vigilant Rebuke counterspells as a reaction.

subclasses.name: Glory
subclasses.description: Mobility focus. Inspiring Smite distributes temp HP after smites and Peerless Athlete grants athletics/acrobatics advantage — solid but not top tier.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.description: A warrior who uses martial prowess and nature magic to combat threats on the edges of civilization.

subclasses.name: Hunter
subclasses.description: Generic damage options. Colossus Slayer and Horde Breaker add extra damage but lack the burst and utility of better ranger subclasses.

features_detail.name: Hunter's Prey
features_detail.desc: Choose: Colossus Slayer (+1d8 on already-wounded target, 1/turn), Giant Killer (reaction attack when Large+ misses you), Horde Breaker (second attack on adjacent target).

features_detail.name: Defensive Tactics
features_detail.desc: Choose: Escape the Horde (no OA disadvantage), Multiattack Defense (+4 AC after hit from same creature), Steel Will (advantage on frightened saves).

features_detail.name: Multiattack
features_detail.desc: Choose: Volley (ranged attack each creature in 10 ft radius) or Whirlwind Attack (melee attack each creature within 5 ft).

features_detail.name: Superior Hunter's Defense
features_detail.desc: Choose: Evasion (DEX save: no damage on success, half on fail), Stand Against the Tide (OA vs creature: redirect to another creature), Uncanny Dodge.

subclasses.name: Beast Master
subclasses.description: Weak action economy — beast attacks require your action or bonus action. Primal Companion helps but still action-starved compared to others.

features_detail.name: Ranger's Companion
features_detail.desc: Bond with a beast companion (CR ≤ 1/4). It acts on your initiative. Command as bonus action. Revive with spell slot in 1 min.

features_detail.name: Exceptional Training
features_detail.desc: Companion gains proficiency in Perception. Its attacks count as magical. Bonus action: it takes Dash/Disengage/Help.

features_detail.name: Bestial Fury
features_detail.desc: Companion makes 2 attacks on Attack action.

features_detail.name: Share Spells
features_detail.desc: When casting a spell on yourself, you can target companion instead or in addition (if spell targets one creature).

subclasses.name: Gloom Stalker
subclasses.description: Best ambush subclass. Dread Ambusher adds extra attack and damage on turn 1, Umbral Sight grants invisible-in-darkness, Stalker's Flurry prevents misses.

subclasses.name: Swarmkeeper
subclasses.description: Battlefield manipulation. Gathered Swarm deals bonus damage and forces movement — push enemies off ledges or pull allies to safety.

subclasses.name: Drakewarden
subclasses.description: Strong drake companion with scaling resistances. Drake gains flight at level 7 and shares resistances with the ranger — very strong scaling.

subclasses.name: Horizon Walker
subclasses.description: Mobility and planar damage. Planar Warrior adds force damage, Ethereal Step grants misty step as a bonus action — strong positioning.

subclasses.name: Fey Wanderer
subclasses.description: Charm and combat mix. Dreadful Strikes adds psychic damage, and Beguiling Twist redirects charm/fear effects against the caster.

subclasses.name: Monster Slayer
subclasses.description: Situational. Slayer's Prey adds extra damage on first hit per turn, and Magic-User's Nemesis counters spellcasters — niche but functional.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to overcome obstacles and enemies. Rogues have many faces: a swindler, bounty hunter, or guild thief.

subclasses.name: Thief
subclasses.description: Item interaction focus. Fast Hands applies Cunning Action to Use Object, Supreme Sneak grants permanent advantage in stealth, Use Magic Device unlocks any magic item.

features_detail.name: Fast Hands
features_detail.desc: Use bonus action for Sleight of Hand, thieves' tools, or Use an Object action.

features_detail.name: Second-Story Work
features_detail.desc: Climb costs no extra movement. Running jump distance + DEX mod feet.

features_detail.name: Supreme Sneak
features_detail.desc: Advantage on Stealth while moving no more than half speed.

features_detail.name: Use Magic Device
features_detail.desc: Ignore class/race/level requirements on magic item use.

features_detail.name: Thief's Reflexes
features_detail.desc: Take two turns in first combat round (at normal initiative and initiative - 10).

subclasses.name: Assassin
subclasses.description: Surprise-dependent. Assassinate grants automatic crits on surprised targets — devastating opener but situational and GM-dependent.

features_detail.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features_detail.desc: Disguise kit and poisoner's kit proficiency.

features_detail.name: Assassinate
features_detail.desc: Advantage on attacks against creatures that haven't acted. Automatic critical hit on surprised creatures.

features_detail.name: Infiltration Expertise
features_detail.desc: Spend 7 days creating false identity (history, profession, affiliations). 25 gp required.

features_detail.name: Impostor
features_detail.desc: Unerringly mimic speech, writing, behavior of a creature studied for 3+ hours. Insight vs Deception to detect.

features_detail.name: Death Strike
features_detail.desc: When hitting a surprised creature: double damage (CON save DC 8+DEX+PB to negate doubling).

subclasses.name: Arcane Trickster
subclasses.description: Best rogue flexibility. Mage Hand Legerdemain and spell access grant unique options — Booming Blade synergizes with Sneak Attack.

features_detail.name: Spellcasting
features_detail.desc: Cast Wizard spells (INT). Mostly Enchantment and Illusion. Gain Mage Hand with enhanced abilities.

features_detail.name: Mage Hand Legerdemain
features_detail.desc: Mage Hand is invisible. Stow/retrieve objects, pick locks, disarm traps, pickpocket—all with Sleight of Hand using it.

features_detail.name: Magical Ambush
features_detail.desc: If hidden when casting: creature has disadvantage on the first saving throw against your spell.

features_detail.name: Versatile Trickster
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: use Mage Hand to distract a creature, giving you advantage on attacks against it.

features_detail.name: Spell Thief
features_detail.desc: After creature casts a spell: steal it. They lose it for 8 hours, you can cast it once (using their spell save DC). 1/long rest.

subclasses.name: Swashbuckler
subclasses.description: Strong duelist. Fancy Footwork prevents opportunity attacks after melee, Panache grants charmed condition, Solo Sneak Attack enables Sneak without ally.

subclasses.name: Soulknife
subclasses.description: Psionic reliability. Psychic Blades always work (no ammunition), Psi-Powered Leap grants flight, and Rend Mind can paralyze on hit.

subclasses.name: Phantom
subclasses.description: Strong scaling necrotic damage from Wails from the Grave — hits a second target for half Sneak Attack damage, excellent against groups.

subclasses.name: Mastermind
subclasses.description: Tactical but niche. Master of Tactics lets you Help from 30 ft away but the overall feature set is weak compared to other rogue options.

subclasses.name: Inquisitive
subclasses.description: Detection specialist. Insightful Fighting grants Sneak Attack without ally but requires a bonus action check — unreliable in fast combat.

subclasses.name: Scout
subclasses.description: Mobility and exploration. Skirmisher lets you move as a reaction when an enemy ends their turn nearby, Survivalist grants expertise in Nature/Survival.

classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline. Sorcerers carry a magical birthright conferred upon them by an exotic bloodline.

subclasses.name: Draconic Bloodline
subclasses.description: Durable but simple. Draconic Resilience adds 1 HP per level and base AC 13+DEX, and Elemental Affinity boosts same-element damage — straightforward.

features_detail.name: Dragon Ancestor
features_detail.desc: Choose dragon type. Speak Draconic. Double proficiency on Charisma checks with dragons.

features_detail.name: Draconic Resilience
features_detail.desc: HP maximum +1/sorcerer level. AC 13+DEX when not wearing armor.

features_detail.name: Elemental Affinity
features_detail.desc: When casting a spell matching your dragon type's damage: add CHA mod to one damage roll. Spend 1 sorcery point: resistance to that damage type for 1 hour.

features_detail.name: Dragon Wings
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: sprout wings. Fly speed = walking speed. No armor required.

features_detail.name: Draconic Presence
features_detail.desc: Spend 5 sorcery points: 60 ft aura of awe or fear for 1 min (WIS save or charmed/frightened). Concentration.

subclasses.name: Wild Magic
subclasses.description: Random magical surges with mixed value. Tides of Chaos grants advantage once, triggering a Wild Magic Surge — Bend Luck is excellent reaction.

features_detail.name: Wild Magic Surge
features_detail.desc: After casting a sorcerer spell 1st level or higher: DM can have you roll on the Wild Magic Surge table.

features_detail.name: Tides of Chaos
features_detail.desc: Gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw. 1/long rest (or when Wild Magic Surge occurs).

features_detail.name: Bend Luck
features_detail.desc: Spend 2 sorcery points: add/subtract 1d4 from another creature's attack roll, ability check, or saving throw.

features_detail.name: Controlled Chaos
features_detail.desc: When rolling Wild Magic Surge: roll twice and use either result.

features_detail.name: Spell Bombardment
features_detail.desc: When rolling spell damage: if any dice show max, roll one of those dice again and add to total (once per turn).

subclasses.name: Divine Soul
subclasses.description: Best spell flexibility. Access to the entire Cleric spell list combined with Sorcerer's Metamagic makes this the most versatile healing caster.

subclasses.name: Aberrant Mind
subclasses.description: Best psionic caster. Telepathic Speech, free subtle-spelled psychic spells, and Warping Implosion at level 18 for massive forced movement.

subclasses.name: Clockwork Soul
subclasses.description: Extremely optimized spell list from Mechanus. Restore Balance removes advantage/disadvantage and Trance of Order makes attacks never miss at level 18.

subclasses.name: Shadow
subclasses.description: Darkness synergy. Eyes of the Dark creates a magical darkness only you can see through, Hound of Ill Omen imposes disadvantage on saves.

features_detail.name: Shadow Arts
features_detail.desc: Spend ki: cast Darkness, Darkvision, Pass without Trace, Silence (no concentration). Minor Illusion cantrip for free.

features_detail.name: Shadow Step
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: teleport 60 ft between dim/dark areas. Advantage on next attack.

features_detail.name: Cloak of Shadows
features_detail.desc: In dim light or darkness, use action to become invisible. Ends on attack or cast.

features_detail.name: Opportunist
features_detail.desc: When another creature within 5 ft is hit: reaction to make unarmed strike against that creature.

subclasses.name: Storm
subclasses.description: Mobility and lightning. Tempestuous Magic lets you fly 10 ft as a bonus action after a spell, and Storm's Fury reflects lightning on attackers.

classes.name: Warlock
classes.description: A wielder of magic that is derived from a bargain with an extraplanar entity. Warlocks are seekers of the knowledge that lies hidden in the fabric of the multiverse.

subclasses.name: The Archfey
subclasses.description: Charm and illusion niche. Fey Presence charms/frightens in 10 ft, Misty Escape grants invisibility as a reaction — creative but limited uses.

features_detail.name: Fey Presence
features_detail.desc: Action: 10 ft cube — charmed or frightened until end of your next turn (WIS save). 1/short rest.

features_detail.name: Misty Escape
features_detail.desc: When taking damage: reaction to turn invisible and teleport 60 ft. Invisibility ends on next turn or attacking. 1/short rest.

features_detail.name: Beguiling Defenses
features_detail.desc: Immune to charmed. When creature tries to charm you: turn charm back on it for 1 min (WIS save).

features_detail.name: Dark Delirium
features_detail.desc: Action: one creature within 60 ft charmed or frightened for 1 min (WIS save). Repeat each turn. 1/short rest.

subclasses.name: The Fiend
subclasses.description: Sustained damage and temp HP. Dark One's Blessing grants temp HP on kill — keeps the warlock alive in extended combat encounters.

features_detail.name: Dark One's Blessing
features_detail.desc: When you kill a creature: gain CHA mod + warlock level temp HP.

features_detail.name: Dark One's Own Luck
features_detail.desc: When making ability check or saving throw: add 1d10. 1/short rest.

features_detail.name: Fiendish Resilience
features_detail.desc: Choose one damage type after short/long rest: resistance to it until next rest.

features_detail.name: Hurl Through Hell
features_detail.desc: On hit: target flung through lower planes, 10d10 psychic on return. Frightened 1/long rest.

subclasses.name: The Great Old One
subclasses.description: Telepathy-heavy RP subclass. Awakened Mind grants telepathy, Create Thrall mind-controls, but combat features are weaker than other patrons.

features_detail.name: Awakened Mind
features_detail.desc: Telepathically speak with creatures within 30 ft that have a language.

features_detail.name: Entropic Ward
features_detail.desc: Reaction to being attacked: impose disadvantage. If attacker misses: gain advantage on your next attack against it. 1/short rest.

features_detail.name: Thought Shield
features_detail.desc: Telepathy can't be read against your will. Psychic damage resistance. Damage dealt to you with psychic also dealt to attacker.

features_detail.name: Create Thrall
features_detail.desc: Touch incapacitated humanoid: charmed until Remove Curse. Telepathic link while on same plane.

subclasses.name: Genie
subclasses.description: Extremely flexible patron power. Genie's Vessel grants a rest space, Sanctuary vessel buff, and elemental damage augmentation — top tier utility.

subclasses.name: Celestial
subclasses.description: Healing warlock. Healing Light pool grants dice-based healing, and Radiant Soul adds radiant damage to fire/radiant spells — unique support role.

subclasses.name: Hexblade
subclasses.description: Top-tier melee warlock. Hexblade's Curse adds proficiency bonus to damage and crits, Hex Warrior uses CHA for weapon attacks, grants medium armor.

subclasses.name: Fathomless
subclasses.description: Water and tentacle battlefield control. Tentacle of the Deeps deals cold damage and reduces speed by 10 ft on hit — strong zone control.

subclasses.name: Undead
subclasses.description: Form of Dread grants temp HP, fear on hits, and immunity to fear — strong control and durability with excellent sustained fight presence.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality. Wizards are supreme magic-users, defined and united as a class by the spells they cast.

subclasses.name: School of Abjuration
subclasses.description: Best defensive wizard. Arcane Ward absorbs damage, Projected Ward extends it to allies — strong survivability focus with Spell Resistance at level 14.

features_detail.name: Abjuration Savant
features_detail.desc: Half cost (gold and time) to copy Abjuration spells into spellbook.

features_detail.name: Arcane Ward
features_detail.desc: When casting Abjuration spell of 1st level+: create ward with HP = 2× wizard level + INT mod. Absorbs damage before you do. Recharge by casting Abjuration spells.

features_detail.name: Projected Ward
features_detail.desc: Reaction: Arcane Ward absorbs damage for ally within 30 ft.

features_detail.name: Improved Abjuration
features_detail.desc: When casting Abjuration spell requiring ability check: add PB.

features_detail.name: Spell Resistance
features_detail.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells. Resistance to spell damage.

subclasses.name: School of Conjuration
subclasses.description: Teleport and summons. Minor Conjuration creates small objects and Focused Conjuration prevents concentration from breaking on conjuration spells.

subclasses.name: School of Divination
subclasses.description: Portent is game-breaking. Two d20 rolls each long rest that replace any roll you choose — automatic crits or automatic failures on demand.

features_detail.name: Divination Savant
features_detail.desc: Half cost to copy Divination spells.

features_detail.name: Portent
features_detail.desc: After long rest: roll 2d20 (3d20 at Level 14). Replace any roll made by any creature with one of these results (before outcome). Unused dice expire after long rest.

features_detail.name: Expert Divination
features_detail.desc: When casting Divination spell of 2nd level or higher: recover a lower-level expended spell slot.

features_detail.name: The Third Eye
features_detail.desc: Bonus action: gain Darkvision 60 ft, Ethereal Sight 60 ft, read any language, or see invisible within 10 ft. Until long rest.

features_detail.name: Greater Portent
features_detail.desc: Roll 3d20 for Portent feature.

subclasses.name: School of Enchantment
subclasses.description: Mind control niche. Hypnotic Gaze charms creatures each turn, and Alter Memories makes targets forget being charmed — powerful social and combat tool.

subclasses.name: School of Evocation
subclasses.description: Safe AoE damage. Sculpt Spells excludes chosen creatures from area effects, making Fireball safe for allies — consistent and reliable.

features_detail.name: Evocation Savant
features_detail.desc: Half cost to copy Evocation spells.

features_detail.name: Sculpt Spells
features_detail.desc: When casting Evocation spell: choose 1+spell level creatures to automatically succeed save and take no damage.

features_detail.name: Potent Cantrip
features_detail.desc: Creatures that succeed on save vs your cantrip still take half damage.

features_detail.name: Empowered Evocation
features_detail.desc: Add INT mod to one Evocation damage roll per spell.

features_detail.name: Overchannel
features_detail.desc: When casting an Evocation spell of 5th level or lower: maximize damage. 1/turn free. After first use: 2d12 necrotic each subsequent time (before next long rest).

subclasses.name: School of Illusion
subclasses.description: High creativity ceiling. Malleable Illusions can be changed as an action, and Illusory Reality makes one illusion real for 1 minute per day.

features_detail.name: Illusion Savant
features_detail.desc: Half cost to copy Illusion spells.

features_detail.name: Improved Minor Illusion
features_detail.desc: Learn Minor Illusion cantrip. Create both sound and image at once with it.

features_detail.name: Malleable Illusions
features_detail.desc: Use action to change illusion spells you've cast while concentrating.

features_detail.name: Illusory Self
features_detail.desc: When attacked: reaction to interpose illusory duplicate. Attacker misses. 1/short rest.

features_detail.name: Illusory Reality
features_detail.desc: After casting 1st-level+ illusion: bonus action to make one non-creature/object part real for 1 min.

subclasses.name: School of Necromancy
subclasses.description: Undead scaling via Undead Thralls adds proficiency bonus to damage and HP. Inured to Undeath grants necrotic resistance and max HP bump.

features_detail.name: Necromancy Savant
features_detail.desc: Half cost to copy Necromancy spells.

features_detail.name: Grim Harvest
features_detail.desc: When you kill a creature with a spell: regain HP equal to 2× spell level (3× for Necromancy spells). No effect on undead/constructs.

features_detail.name: Undead Thralls
features_detail.desc: Animate Dead creates one extra undead. Your undead have +PB to damage and HP equal to wizard level.

features_detail.name: Inured to Undeath
features_detail.desc: Resistance to necrotic damage. Max HP can't be reduced.

features_detail.name: Command Undead
features_detail.desc: Action: charm an undead within 60 ft (CHA save DC = spell save DC). Fails save: under your control until you lose concentration (up to 24 hours). Intelligent undead repeat save each hour.

subclasses.name: School of Transmutation
subclasses.description: Flexible but highly situational. Transmuter's Stone grants varying buffs to one creature, Shapechanger grants true polymorph at level 14.

features_detail.name: Transmutation Savant
features_detail.desc: Half cost to copy Transmutation spells.

features_detail.name: Minor Alchemy
features_detail.desc: Transform small amounts of one material into another (lead↔iron, copper↔silver, etc.) for 1 hour.

features_detail.name: Transmuter's Stone
features_detail.desc: Create a stone that grants one benefit (darkvision 60 ft, +10 ft speed, proficiency in CON saves, or resistance to one energy type). Change benefit after long rest.

features_detail.name: Shapechanger
features_detail.desc: Cast Polymorph without expending a spell slot (only targets yourself). 1/short rest.

features_detail.name: Master Transmuter
features_detail.desc: Consume Transmuter's Stone for: Remove Curse/Blight, restore all HP + end conditions, cast Polymorph on creature turning into CR8 beast, or cast Reverse Gravity once.

subclasses.name: Bladesinging
subclasses.description: Top melee wizard. Bladesong adds INT to AC, concentration saves, and speed — enables melee combat with full wizard spell progression.

subclasses.name: Time
subclasses.description: Specializes in time manipulation. Can alter dice rolls, control initiative, freeze enemies or allies temporally, and store spells via Arcane Abeyance.

subclasses.name: Scribe Wizard
subclasses.description: Specializes in magical writing and flexible spell adaptation. Awakened Spellbook allows swapping damage types, efficient ritual casting, and spell storage.

subclasses.name: War Magic
subclasses.description: Initiative bonus and defensive reactions. Arcane Deflection grants +2 AC or +4 saves as a reaction — excellent defensive reliability at any level.

subclasses.name: Graviturgy wizard
subclasses.description: Specializes in gravity effects — alter weight, pull or push enemies, and control positioning. Gravity Well and Violent Attraction enhance movement control.

classes.name: Artificer
classes.description: Masters of invention, artificers use ingenuity and magic to unlock extraordinary capabilities in objects. They see magic as a complex system waiting to be decoded and then harnessed in their spells and inventions.
features: The Right Tool for the Job

subclasses.name: Alchemist
subclasses.description: Situational healing and buffs with weak scaling compared to other subclasses. Experimental Elixirs are random but can produce powerful effects.

features_detail.name: Tool Proficiency
features_detail.desc: Proficiency with Alchemist's Supplies if not already.

features_detail.name: Alchemical Savant
features_detail.desc: Spells cast with alchemist's supplies: add INT mod to one healing or acid/fire/necrotic/poison damage roll.

features_detail.name: Experimental Elixir
features_detail.desc: Long rest: create 1 elixir (2 at Level 6, 3 at Level 15). Random effect: Healing, Swiftness, Resilience, Boldness, Flight, Transformation. 24h duration.

features_detail.name: Restorative Reagents
features_detail.desc: Drinking your elixir grants 2d6+INT temp HP. Cast Lesser Restoration 2× per long rest without a slot via supplies.

features_detail.name: Chemical Mastery
features_detail.desc: Resistance to acid and poison. Cast Greater Restoration and Heal each once per long rest for free using alchemist's supplies.

subclasses.name: Artillerist
subclasses.description: Strong turret-based damage and area control. Eldritch Cannon offers Flamethrower, Force Ballista, or Protector options with solid scaling.

subclasses.name: Armorer
subclasses.description: Highly versatile armor modes — Guardian for melee tank or Infiltrator for stealth ranged. Excellent defense, flexibility, and mobility options.

subclasses.name: Battle Smith
subclasses.description: Top-tier subclass. Steel Defender provides free damage and reactions, Battle Ready uses INT for weapon attacks, and scaling makes it consistently powerful.

subclasses.name: Cartagropher
subclasses.description: Exploration and mapping focused subclass with strong out-of-combat utility and unique terrain interaction abilities.
